data.title: Class action lawsuit filed against Circle for failure to freeze $285M in stolen USDC during hack where hackers moved funds in 8 hours.
data.description: Attorneys claim that Circle did not freeze the stolen USDC in time when hackers transferred funds from the exploited trading platform during an eight-hour period.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 17, 2026
data.description: Several companies are set to release their quarterly earnings report before the bell today. Ally Financial is expected to announce earnings of $0.94 per share with revenue around $2.15 billion. Truist Financial is projected to report earnings of $1.00 per share with revenue of $5.17 billion. Fifth Third Bancorp is also expected to announce earnings, estimated at $0.47 per share, on revenue of $2.85 billion. Autoliv seems likely to report earnings of $1.80 per share with revenue of $2.61 billion. Stay updated for more details on these reports.

data.title: Energy Recovery to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Energy Recovery, Inc. (NASDAQ: ERII) based in San Leandro, California, is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company's earnings release is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. A live conference call to discuss the results and other related matters will be held on the same day at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. For those interested, the listen-only conference call can be accessed by dialing +1 (877) 709-8150 within the US and Canada.

data.title: MasTec plans Q1 2026 earnings conference call.
data.description: In a recent report on the economy, it was stated that the country's GDP grew by 3.5% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of 2.7%. The unemployment rate has fallen to 4.1%, the lowest in the past five years. Additionally, the stock market has surged by 8% in the past month, with the benchmark index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. Experts predict continued growth in the coming months, citing increased consumer spending and business investments as key driving factors.

data.title: SunCoke Energy, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Date
data.description: SunCoke Energy, Inc. (NYSE: SXC) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026, before the New York Stock Exchange opens for trading. The company will conduct its quarterly earnings call at 11:00 am ET on the same day. For those interested, the conference call will be available for live streaming at a dedicated web address and will be accessible for replay in the Investors section of the SunCoke Energy website. Investors and analysts are encouraged to participate in the event.

data.title: HASI Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HASI), a prominent sustainable infrastructure asset investor, revealed that its first quarter 2026 outcomes will be disclosed post-market closure on May 7, 2026. A conference call is scheduled at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) following the release, which can be joined by dialing 1-877-407-0890 (Toll-Free) or +1-201-389-0918 (toll).

data.title: Polestar reports fourth quarter select and full-year 2025 financial results
data.description: Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY) has released its consolidated financial results and operational metrics for the year and three months ending December 31, 2025. CEO Michael Lohscheller shared that the company achieved record-breaking results in 2025, with retail sales exceeding 60,000 cars and revenue exceeding USD 3 billion. The strong commercial performance was attributed to the expansion of the sales network and the success of the model line-up. From June 2025 to present, the company has seen significant growth in various aspects.

data.title: €1.3M funding for MastCURe's innovative mast-cell directed therapies
data.description: In Basel, Switzerland on April 17, 2026, MastCURe, a prominent research consortium, secured €1.3 million in funding from the Eureka Eurostars program. This collaboration involves Allegria Therapeutics, Cube Biotech, and the Fraunhofer Institute for Translational Medicine.

data.title: Upstream Bio to Present New Data from Phase 2 VIBRANT Trial of Verekitug at the ATS 2026 International Conference
data.description: WALTHAM, Mass., April 17, 2026 - Upstream Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: UPB), a clinical-stage company focusing on treatments for inflammatory diseases, particularly severe respiratory disorders, revealed plans to present two posters at the American Thoracic Society (ATS) 2026 International Conference in Orlando, FL, on May 18, 2026. The presentations will unveil fresh insights from the Phase 2 VIBRANT trial assessing verekitug, the sole antagonist to the thymic stromal lymphopoietin (TSLP) receptor currently progressing through clinical phases, in chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps (CRSwNP). The data will showcase the clinical impact of verekitug on participants with CRSwNP and coexisting asthma, alongside its effects on nasal and blood biomarkers.
Kustom Entertainment and Cycurion agree on terms for sale of legacy video solutions segment. Deal worth $5 million.

data.title: AOI Expands Its Houston-Area Footprint to 900,000 Square Feet to Increase Capacity and Support Future Growth
data.description: AOI, a tech company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AAOI, recently revealed plans for a substantial growth of its manufacturing operations in the Houston region. The expansion will involve the addition of 388,000 square feet of space in Pearland, Texas.
BioXcel Therapeutics plans virtual event to discuss commercial launch plan for IGALMI® in home setting, based on market opportunity assessment.

data.title: Golf Inc. Magazine Ranks Concert Golf Partners' Purchase of The Club at New Seabury as No. 1 Deal of Year
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 16, 2026, Concert Golf Partners finalized the acquisition of The Club at New Seabury located on Cape Cod. This transaction has been recognized as the top deal for the "Top Sales of 2025" by Golf Inc. magazine in their March/April 2026 publication. The prestigious New Seabury property was bought from IE Homes, Clubs & with impressive recognition for its value and impact on the industry.
